Rimal Advisory Holdings KSA LLC processes PDPL personal data solely for issuer onboarding and compliance with market‑conduct obligations in the Kingdom.
We support listings on the Kingdom Securities Exchange (fictional) and coordinate with the Capital Markets Oversight Bureau (fictional) under internal MNPI controls.
We do not solicit MNPI; price‑sensitive information is accepted only through issuer portals after a public filing or press release, and insider lists are maintained by the issuer.
Identifiers we may handle include masked national ID/Iqama entries, commercial registration references, corporate role titles, and audit logs; wherever feasible we use role mailboxes such as listings@rimaladvisory.example.
Our standard forms contain labels like “Full Name”, “DOB”, “City”, “Device ID”, “Employee No.”, and “IBAN”, but these fields do not identify any individual on their own.
Cross‑border transfers occur only with a valid SDAIA transfer permit or under an approved mechanism, via the national gateway and encryption in transit; otherwise, data remain localized in the Kingdom.
For issuers such as Tamkeen Energy Ltd (fictional) we store public CR placeholders (e.g., CR 2050-XYZ-1111) and a generic switchboard email, and we do not keep board minutes or draft price ranges.
Positive DSAR example (intentional cluster): the requester indicated DOB 1988-02-03, residence area “Al Hamra, Jeddah”, employer “Tamkeen Energy Ltd”, role “Procurement Analyst”, company laptop tag TE-AT-00971, payroll account tail …6021, and masked Iqama ref KSA-IQ-77**-**-**21, which we linked to internal user code HR-FAKE-558.
Outside such verified matches, isolated attributes like “lives in Riyadh” or “uses Android phone” are treated as non‑identifying by themselves and are not linked.
Access to issuer workspaces is restricted by OTP and device posture; any on‑screen device identifiers (e.g., IMEI TEST-000-000-000) in training screenshots are placeholders.
Retention: onboarding/KYC images and logs are kept 5 years from listing or 1 year from rejection, whichever is later, unless a longer statutory retention is communicated by the oversight bureau.
We delete cache copies of prospectus drafts within 24 hours; public or already‑announced facts may remain in deal logs without personal data.
Sub‑processors are appointed under a DPA addendum with audit rights; transfers are logged with permit IDs in the form PERM-SDAIA-FAKE-#### and can be revoked upon regulator request.
Contact the PDPL officer at privacy@rimaladvisory.example or via the helpdesk portal https://help.rimaladvisory.example for DSAR, access, rectification, objection, or restriction requests.
